scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @dentica/web" "npm run dev --workspace @dentica/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dentica/web && npm run build --workspace @dentica/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @dentica/web && npm run lint --workspace @dentica/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @dentica/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @dentica/api
